caption: A man with a distinctive tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, appearing in a series of sequential shots. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a stand. In the background, several framed photographs are mounted on a wall, alongside clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. A recurring red and white logo on the screen reads "GOSS TALK JOY" with "PODCAST" written underneath in a smaller white box. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts slightly; he starts with a neutral gaze, begins to speak with his mouth open, and then looks slightly downward with a more focused or contemplative expression. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up throughout the scene.
